## 2026-05-18 - [HIGH] Fix overly permissive cookie domain matching
**Vulnerability:** The cookie filtering functions in `youtube.py` and `vimeo.py` used a naive substring search (`"youtube.com" in line_str`) to filter the Netscape HTTP Cookie File generated by `yt-dlp`.
**Learning:** This approach could inadvertently match and retain sensitive cookies from other domains if the targeted domain string appeared in the cookie value, path, or was part of a longer domain name (e.g., `evil-youtube.com`, `bank.com` with a cookie value containing `youtube.com`), exposing them locally.
**Prevention:** Proper parsing of the tab-separated Netscape format should be used. Split each line by `\t` and perform strict suffix/exact matching on the domain column (`domain.endswith(".youtube.com") or domain == "youtube.com"`).
